604ec04b2dba140131fd798b.description:
This is a dockerized Rails-React app made for the Department of Computer Science, University of Toronto. The purpose of this app is to:
1. Give the TA (teaching assistant) coordinator an interface so they can select a TA candidate for a given course.
2. Give TA candidate an interface to see and send their response (accept/reject) to a contract.
3. Give the contract coordinator an overview of accepted/rejected contract and a means to mark the processing status of these contracts.

## TAPP
This is the section that fulfills part of the app's purpose.
604ec04b2dba140131fd798b.name: TAPP:CP
604ec04b2dba140131fd798b.summary: TA assignment and matching application (TAPP) & Contract Presentment helper (CP) at the Department of Computer Science, University of Toronto
